title: draba kuramensis
intro: Draba kuramensis, also known as Kuram Mountain Whitlowgrass, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cold, and cough, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba kuramensis include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Draba kuramensis can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
